## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] New Skill (new feature/pattern)
- [ ] Skill Improvement (enhancement to existing skill)
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] Documentation Update

## Checklist

- [ ] My code/skill follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own changes
- [ ] I have verified that the skill works as expected with an AI Assistant
